description: Workflow compliance rules — enforces role boundaries. Logic: extensions NOT in allowed_extensions are treated as code files and blocked from direct Edit/Write.

rules.reason: Code changes must go through Developer (Codex) — direct editing is not allowed. Use mcp__codex-dev__codex to call Developer.
Code files must be created through Developer (Codex) — direct writing is not allowed. Use mcp__codex-dev__codex to call Developer.
Calling Developer requires a structured prompt (must contain a ## heading)
